<thought>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>

First, I should move out of the lava-blocked vertical area by turning right and moving toward the corridor at row 06.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>

From my current position, the most direct safe route is to move right along row 02, but there is lava at column C (row 02 col C is `L`), so I cannot go forward. Instead, I should turn downward to look for a safe path around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 08 column G. From my current position, I should head right across the open corridor on row 02, avoiding the lava at column C (L). I need to face right first, so I will turn left to change direction from down (`v`) to right (`>`).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column G. I should move toward the open corridor along column B downwards, since column B is clear in rows 03-06 and row 07 has `L` blocks that prevent direct downward progress. First, I’ll advance forward if possible: the cell at row 02 column C is `L`, so I must avoid it by turning. To proceed safely along column B, I should face down (`v`) and then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 08 column G. From my current position, moving forward would go into a lava cell at row 03 column B (`L`), so I must avoid that. The safe direction is to turn right to face left (`<`), then move forward into row 02 column A which is `#` (blocked) — so instead I will turn left to face right (`>`), where row 02 column C is also `L`. Therefore, I should turn right once more to face up (`^`), then move forward to row 01 column B which is `#` (blocked). The only workable progress is to turn right to face left and look for a safe path; I will start by turning left to face right? But both right and forward are lava. Best is to turn right to face left and then check: row 02 column A is `#`, so that’s blocked too. Given constraints, I need to begin orienting to move along the open corridor on the right; I will TURN_LEFT to face left? Actually from `v`, TURN_LEFT -> `>` (into lava), TURN_RIGHT -> `<` (into wall). Choose TURN_LEFT to attempt escaping upward corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>

</thought>

<thought>
